meaning: n.(三角裤与胸罩分开的)比基尼泳装
examples: I felt a bit self-conscious in my bikini.
A one-piece is more flattering than a bikini.
She had objected to a photo showing her in a bikini.
Men and women seeking a well-groomed bikini line are at greater risk of infections, say researchers.
Oh and yeah, they have plans to release " The Best of Bikini Destinations" Nice.
